name: Symptoms started weeks after work slip, can I still claim?

mainEntity.name: Symptoms started weeks after work slip, can I still claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, claim within 1 year of discovery if doctor links to fall.
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if medically linked to incident; Utah allows claims for latent injuries discovered later, within 1-year statute from discovery. Get doctor nexus letter[1]. Key factors: Prompt reporting preserves; delayed doesn't bar if proven. Attorney argues aggravation.

description: Yes, claim within 1 year of discovery if doctor links to fall.
